app.name: TagLedger
app.tagline: Local-first label capture for workshop teams.
home.title: Logistics workbench
home.subtitle: Separate scan, outbound, inbound, inventory locations, history and admin into clear entry points so the floor team can choose the job first.
home.card.mobile.title: Mobile scan work
home.card.mobile.desc: Capture photos, scan codes, enter part numbers manually and keep the current outbound order.
home.card.outbound.title: Outbound check
home.card.outbound.desc: Select orders and check part hits, remaining quantities and completion status.
home.card.inbound.title: Inbound receiving
home.card.inbound.desc: Next step: split out inbound receiving by part, location and quantity.
home.card.inventory.title: Inventory and locations
home.card.inventory.desc: Find all locations for a part, then support empty, replenish and disabled states.
home.card.history.title: Outbound ledger
home.card.history.desc: Review OCR history, outbound snapshots, location deductions and current progress.
home.card.admin.title: Admin management
home.card.admin.desc: Manage accounts, trainee limits and supervisor permissions.
home.card.ops.title: Ops health
home.card.ops.desc: Check service, config, data and background job health.
home.card.capture.title: Desktop capture
home.card.capture.desc: Keep the original desktop photo/OCR demo available.
home.card.transfers.title: Three-factory transfer
home.card.transfers.desc: Create transfers by source and target factory with paired ledgers and one transfer_id.
demo.title: Machine label capture
demo.subtitle: Upload label photos, review OCR and barcode results, then confirm records into SQLite.
demo.board.title: Record board
demo.board.hint: Select a record to reload the review form.
upload.dropZone: Choose clear label photos and keep one label per image.
upload.file.label: Label photo
upload.files.label: Label photos
upload.batch.empty: Choose multiple images to upload and scan them in order.
upload.batch.done: Batch scan finished. Review all records.
form.category.title: Category
ocr.timeout: Scan timed out. Try again or contact operations.
ocr.reviewNeeded: The scan is unclear. Check the photo or fill the fields manually.
barcode.title: Barcode scan
material.title: Material match
duplicate.title: Duplicate record found
duplicate.noDetails: No existing-record details returned. Check the duplicate list.
history.title: History
history.subtitle: Review stored and in-progress records with status, keyword and date filters.
history.filters.title: Filters
status.help.uploaded: The image is uploaded and waiting for OCR.
status.help.ocrDone: Local OCR is done. Review fields and confirm locally.
status.help.needsReview: Result is incomplete. Retake or fill missing fields.
status.help.duplicate: A duplicate was found. Overwrite or discard the new record.
status.help.confirmed: Local record is saved. SaaS submit can stay disabled for field testing.
status.help.submissionFailed: SaaS submit failed or dry-run setup is incomplete. Local intake can continue.
error.ocrTimeout: Scan timed out. Retake or try again later.
error.missingFields: Enter VIN/BIN or SN before confirming.
error.noPhoto: Take or choose one label photo first.
guide.title: Photo guide
guide.item2: Keep the full label inside the frame.
guide.item3: Make Model / VIN-BIN / SN sharp and readable.
guide.item4: Face the label straight on and avoid glare, shadows and tilt.
guide.item5: If OCR fails, fill the fields manually.
mobile.title: Capture, check, save
mobile.subtitle: Phone workflow for label capture, OCR, correction and local confirmation.
mobile.capture.title: Frame the label
mobile.capture.hint: Keep the label flat, bright and fully inside the locator corners.
mobile.capture.preview: Take a clear, complete, straight label photo
mobile.capture.autoNote: Camera photos upload after confirmation. Gallery images can be previewed first.
mobile.scan.title: Scanning label
mobile.edit.title: Correct fields
mobile.confirm.title: Confirm record
mobile.confirm.hint: Check the fields, duplicate policy and barcode data before saving.
mobile.done.title: Record saved
mobile.done.hint: Continue with the next machine when the label is attached.
mobile.runtime.title: Runtime
mobile.recent.title: Recent records
outbound.title: Outbound reconciliation
outbound.brand.subtitle: Picking sheet / shipping order
outbound.subtitle: Use the last two workbook sheets: multi-part shipping orders and picking list. Search by part code, Ruiyun number, or SKU.
outbound.select.hint: Select one or more orders. Scans and typed codes will be checked against those orders.
transfer.title: Three-factory transfer
transfer.subtitle: A transfer writes two rows: source transfer_out and target transfer_in, linked by one transfer_id.
transfer.create.title: Create transfer
transfer.list.title: Transfer ledger in last 30 days
outbound.history.title: My scan history today
outbound.history.empty: No scan records for the current order
outbound.summary.orders: {note} Orders: {orders}; matched: {matched}; over-shipped: {overShipped}; under-shipped: {underShipped}; extra shipping: {shippingExtra}; picking missing shipping: {cuttingMissing}
outbound.empty.noOrdersSelected: Select one or more outbound orders first.
outbound.empty.noPartsSelected: Select an order to view part details.
outbound.empty.noOtherOrders: No unfinished parts in other orders.
outbound.prompt.supervisorQty: A supervisor, manager, or IT admin account is required to edit outbound quantities.
outbound.prompt.supervisorBatch: A supervisor, manager, or IT admin account is required to void this batch.
outbound.prompt.supervisorPhone: A supervisor, manager, or IT admin account is required for undo, quantity edits, complete order, or mark sync.
outbound.prompt.currentPartQty: Enter the current outbound quantity for this part
outbound.prompt.markText: Paste OCR text from the paper order. Lines with a mark beside the quantity will be marked complete.
outbound.error.supervisorRequired: Supervisor, manager, or IT admin account required
outbound.query.notFoundTitle: This code was not found in today's shipping orders.
outbound.query.notFoundBody: Check whether you scanned a VIN/device number. This version supports part codes, Ruiyun numbers, and SKUs.
outbound.query.foundNoSelection: Code found. Select an outbound order to check whether it belongs to the current order.
outbound.query.belongsSelected: Belongs to the selected outbound order.
outbound.query.notBelongsSelected: Does not belong to the selected outbound order.
outbound.mobile.title: Outbound order scan check
outbound.confirm.openDone: Order {order} is already done. Open it anyway?
outbound.mobile.label: Outbound check
outbound.manual.title: Manual code / paste
outbound.manual.hint: When a photo has multiple QR codes or barcodes, paste one SKU, Ruiyun number, or barcode value here to match the current outbound order.
outbound.manual.placeholder: Paste SKU / Ruiyun number / barcode value
outbound.manual.empty: Enter or paste a code first.
outbound.manual.noOrder: Select the current outbound order before manual matching.
outbound.manual.noMaterialPair: No catalog pair was found, but the raw input will still be checked against the order.
outbound.mobile.loadingHint: If the network is slow, wait a few seconds or tap refresh quantities.
outbound.mobile.partTodayRemaining: This part has {count} pieces still open today
outbound.mobile.noOtherRemaining: No remaining parts in other orders
outbound.mobile.rollbackConfirm: Rollback whole order {order}? This is allowed only within the rollback window after completion.
outbound.scan.name: Name: {name}
outbound.scan.notFound: This code was not found in today's shipping orders
outbound.scan.saved: Belongs to current order, saved {quantity} outbound
outbound.scan.alreadyRecorded: This photo has already been counted
outbound.scan.alreadyComplete: This part is already fully scanned in current order
outbound.scan.quantityTooLarge: This quantity exceeds remaining quantity. Max remaining: {remaining}
outbound.scan.verificationHint: The scanned part does not match the expected part. Upload a verification photo before confirming outbound.
outbound.scan.verificationUploadFailed: Failed to upload verification record. Try again.
outbound.scan.otherOrders: Not in current order, but belongs to other orders
outbound.scan.todayOtherOrder: This part exists today, but not in current order
outbound.scan.noCandidate: No code available for outbound check
outbound.scan.noCandidateHint: Retake the QR/barcode or confirm the label has a Ruiyun number/SKU.
scan.alt.title: Other locations with stock
scan.alt.chooseLocationHint: This part has multiple locations. Choose the picked location before confirming outbound.
scan.alt.outOfStock: This part is out of stock across all locations. Please restock first.
progress.title: Outbound progress snapshots
progress.brand.subtitle: Snapshot after every update
progress.subtitle: Review required/scanned/remaining data saved after every scan, undo, quantity edit, and complete-order action.
progress.empty: No snapshots yet. The next outbound update will create one.
ops.title: Ops health
ops.brand.subtitle: Service, database, backups, outbound progress
ops.subtitle: Read-only check of service, SQLite, backups, outbound totals, and recent errors.
auth.login.title: Login
auth.login.heroTitle: Enter the right workbench for your role
auth.login.heroSubtitle: Shippers see only their own orders and recent work. Supervisors and managers get global stats, transfers, and account tools. Fewer wrong clicks, fewer permission dead ends.
auth.login.subtitle: Enter your personal account. On first install, open {setup} to create a manager account.
auth.login.failed: Login failed. Check username and password.
auth.setup.title: Initialize manager account
auth.setup.subtitle: Use only on first install. Password must be at least 10 characters. Log in with this account after creation.
auth.setup.done: System is already initialized. Go to {login}.
admin.title: Admin console
admin.subtitle: Create accounts, adjust roles, disable users, and reset passwords. High-risk outbound actions follow the signed-in account role.
admin.accessDenied: Manager permission is required. This account cannot create users, assign outbound orders, or view audit logs.
admin.passphrase.title: Supervisor second-approval passphrase
admin.passphrase.hint: Used for high-risk actions such as quantity edits, undo, batch void, complete order, and mark sync. Only the hash is stored.
admin.status.passwordReset: Password reset. User must change it on next login.
admin.prompt.newPassword: Enter a new password (at least 10 characters):
workbench.scope.loadingDetail: Loading account permissions and today's work scope.
workbench.scope.assignedDetail: This account can only view and scan {orders}; other orders and global stats stay hidden.
workbench.scope.globalDetail: This account can view global intake stats, transfers, user permissions, and outbound progress.
workbench.hero.loading: Start with the most important order today
workbench.hero.operator: Only your assigned outbound orders, finish the current work first
workbench.hero.manager: Global intake and transfer status at a glance
workbench.myStats.title: My last 7 days
workbench.modules.title: Available pages
workbench.modules.subtitle: Entries collapse by account role to reduce mis-taps and permission failures.
workbench.module.mobile.title: Mobile scan
workbench.module.mobile.description: Scan, photograph, and record the current outbound order on site.
workbench.module.outbound.title: My outbound order
workbench.module.outbound.description: Only shows the outbound order and progress assigned to this account.
workbench.module.my_stats.title: My last 7 days
workbench.module.my_stats.description: Review personal scan quantity and recent work trend.
workbench.module.transfers.title: Factory transfers
workbench.module.transfers.description: Create and review transfer flows across the three factories.
workbench.module.dashboard.title: Global intake stats
workbench.module.dashboard.description: View overall intake, OCR, and outbound processing metrics.
workbench.module.admin.title: Accounts and roles
workbench.module.admin.description: Manage account roles, disabled users, and password resets.
workbench.daily.title: Recent work
workbench.daily.empty: No personal scans in the last 7 days.
outbound.page.title: Outbound check
outbound.page.subtitle: Use the outbound workbook sheets: multi-item shipping orders plus picking list. Search by part code, Ruiyun number, or SKU.
outbound.page.orders.title: Orders available for checking
outbound.page.orders.subtitle: Operators only see their assigned order; supervisors and managers can select multiple orders for broader checks.
outbound.page.query.label: Part code / Ruiyun number / SKU
outbound.page.summary.title: Overview
outbound.page.summary.line: {note} Orders: {orders}; matched: {matched}; over: {over}; under: {under}; shipping extra: {extra}; picking missing: {missing}
outbound.page.parts.title: Quantity check by part code
outbound.page.parts.name: Part name
outbound.page.empty.title: No orders available
outbound.page.empty.detail: This account has no matching outbound order today. Ask a supervisor to assign an order or check whether the workbook was updated.
outbound.page.query.noneTitle: This code was not found in today's shipping orders.
outbound.page.query.noneDetail: Check whether you scanned a VIN/device number. This page supports part codes, Ruiyun numbers, and SKUs.
outbound.page.query.needSelection: Code found. Select an outbound order to check whether it belongs to the current order.
outbound.page.query.belongs: Belongs to the selected outbound order.
outbound.page.query.notBelongs: Does not belong to the selected outbound order.
dashboard.title: Operations stats
dashboard.subtitle: Inventory, locations, outbound scans and intake quality in one view, so shortages, active picking and recent exceptions are visible first.
